title: Natural Sponge
description: A simple vanilla-friendly way to obtain sponges naturally.
body:
# Natural Sponge

> **Bring a more natural way to obtain sponges into your world.**

## Overview

Natural Sponge adds a new, lore-friendly way to obtain sponges in Minecraft.

Instead of relying solely on rare structures, sponges can now be discovered naturally in **Warm Ocean biomes** — in the form of **Dead Sponges**.

This feature is designed to stay true to vanilla gameplay while reducing unnecessary randomness and frustration.

## Features

### Dead Sponge Generation
- Generates naturally in **Warm Ocean biomes**
- Appears in small quantities, blended with the environment

### New Block: Dead Sponge
- A dried, inactive form of sponge  
- Must be collected using a **hoe**  
- Drops itself when harvested correctly  

### Crafting
- Dead Sponge can be crafted into a **Sponge**

## Balance

Natural Sponge is carefully balanced to fit vanilla progression:

- Rare generation prevents farming abuse  
- Tool requirement adds interaction depth  
- Maintains exploration as the primary method of acquisition  

> No overpowered mechanics — just a smoother experience.

## Design Philosophy

This mod follows a simple principle:

> **Expand vanilla, don’t replace it.**

Everything is designed to:

- Feel like it *could have been in vanilla*  
- Avoid breaking game balance  
- Encourage exploration rather than grinding  

## Compatibility

- Works with most world generation mods  
- Does not modify existing structures  
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
